gist.headline: Feeding the Tinybird
gist.blurb: We updated our internal telemetry tokens to keep the data flowing smoothly. Just some routine maintenance to keep our analytics happy!
gist.summary: Rotated the Tinybird ingest token in SOPS to match the active workspace token, ensuring event ingestion continues smoothly.
gist.impact: Internal analytics and event logging are back online and syncing correctly for future deployments.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot feeding glowing data seeds to a tiny bird (representing Tinybird analytics) perched on a server rack.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot feeding glowing lime green (#ecf874) data seeds to a tiny, chunky pixel bird perched on a retro server rack. Soft pastel lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
